MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald E Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Davis-Paul Management Group is present. Represented by Michell Davis.
Attorney Kevin Greenquist appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Natasha T. Robinson is present.
Attorney Susan L. Landsittel and Brian Ito representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Toni Young, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of Dec. 17, 2012 is vacated. (501/JPT)
